sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6135" key="a)mfixanh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφιχᾰνής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n6135.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gaping wide,</tr_> Abyden.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0060.tlg001.perseus-grc3:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
